# Summary: minimal, user-facing configuration
configuration=cpu_logical=14, cpu_physical=14, gpus=1, gpu_cores=32

mode=run
feature=default
use_mpi=auto

work_items=5000000
inner_iters=64
repetitions=3

min_cpu_for_gpu=1
num_gpus=-1
gpu_work_fraction=0.750
